name: Candied Ginger Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the bottom of a 10-inch springform pan with cooking spray. Sprinkle with the gingersnap crumbs, and set aside.
2. Position knife blade in food processor bowl. Add the cottage cheese and cream cheese, and process until smooth.
3. Add 3/4 cup sugar, brandy, whole eggs, chopped gingerroot and process until smooth. Pour into a large bowl and set aside.
4. Beat egg whites (at room temperature) and cream of tartar at high speed of an electric mixer until foamy. Gradually add remaining 1/4 cup sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, beating until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently stir one-fourth of the egg white mixture into the cottage cheese mixture. Gently fold in the remaining egg white mixture.
6. Pour into prepared pan. Bake at 325°F for 50 minutes or until almost set. Remove from oven, and cool 15 minutes.
7. Cover and chill at least 8 hours. Garnish with gingerroot strips. Makes 14 servings.
Calories per serving: 199
Fat grams per serving: 7.3
Cholesterol per serving: 51
